title: hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and unique characteristics. As a medicinal plant, Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme is traditionally used to support digestive health, and its consumption is associated with several health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The therapeutic actions of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Bioactive constituents present in Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
